pokie_static.major_operators: Australian Venue Co (AVC), HTP, Stellar Group
pokie_static.market_share: ~60% of NSW/VIC pokie licenses held by multi-pub operators

insolvency.note: Part IX Debt Agreements leading growth in FY2024.

stress_levels.label: Bank credit / mortgages
stress_levels.detail: Mortgage arrears elevated but not crisis levels (RBA Oct 2024)

stress_levels.label: BNPL
stress_levels.detail: Afterpay flat post-peak. ZIP volumes recovering but bad debts elevated.

stress_levels.label: Salary advance / EWA
stress_levels.detail: BeforePay active customers growing YoY. MyPayNow stable.

stress_levels.label: Fintech personal loans
stress_levels.detail: Wisr + Plenti loan books growing but arrears ticking up.

stress_levels.label: Payday / SACC
stress_levels.detail: CCV Australian loan book +20% FY2023, +15% FY2024.

stress_levels.label: Poker Machines (Pubs/Clubs)
stress_levels.detail: NSW/VIC net losses remain elevated. Multi-pub operators (AVC, HTP) drive structural venue demand.

stress_levels.label: Pawnbroking
stress_levels.detail: CCV revenue +38% over 3 years. CEO signals broader demand base.

stress_levels.label: Rent-to-own
stress_levels.detail: Radio Rentals contracted after ASIC action. Market shrinking.

stress_levels.label: Debt collection
stress_levels.detail: CCP PDL acquisitions at record. Lagging indicator — still rising.

stress_levels.label: Personal insolvency
stress_levels.detail: AFSA FY2024: 12,447 total. Part IX Debt Agreements leading growth.

desperation_scale.label: Big Bank Credit Cards / Mortgages
desperation_scale.economic_signal: Baseline. Rising balances = confidence OR early stress.

desperation_scale.label: Buy Now Pay Later (BNPL)
desperation_scale.economic_signal: Rising BNPL use = cash-flow squeeze, payment deferral.
desperation_scale.notes: BNPL peaked 2021–22 then fell as regulation tightened. ZIP bad debts rose sharply 2022–23.

desperation_scale.label: Salary Advance / Earned Wage Access
desperation_scale.economic_signal: Rising demand = workers can't bridge gap to payday.
desperation_scale.notes: BeforePay (B4P) listed ASX 2022. MyPayNow faced ASIC scrutiny 2021 for unlicensed credit.

desperation_scale.label: Non-Bank Personal Loans (Fintech)
desperation_scale.exploitability: MEDIUM — cheaper than payday but costly at high risk tiers
desperation_scale.economic_signal: Rising demand + falling approvals = tightening stress.

desperation_scale.label: Payday / SACC Loans
desperation_scale.typical_apr: NCCP cap: 20% estab + 4%/mo = 48%+ p.a. min; ~400%+ on 2-week loan
desperation_scale.exploitability: HIGH — maximum legal rate, targets credit-impaired
desperation_scale.notes: ASIC reported ~1.77M SACCs originated p.a. (2016–17 data, latest published).

desperation_scale.label: Poker Machines (Pubs & Clubs)
desperation_scale.typical_apr: N/A — avg net loss ~$1,200–$1,500 per adult p.a. in NSW/VIC
desperation_scale.exploitability: VERY HIGH — continuous play, near-miss psychology, direct debit from welfare
desperation_scale.economic_signal: Rising net losses = households diverting essential funds to gambling.
desperation_scale.data_proxy: ASX:ALG (Ainsworth) + ASX:TGR (Tabcorp) venue exposure; NSW/VIC monthly net loss stats
desperation_scale.notes: Multi-pub operators (e.g., Australian Venue Co, HTP, Stellar) hold ~60% of NSW/VIC pokie licenses. Structural demand remains high despite cost-of-living pressures.

desperation_scale.label: Pawnbroking
desperation_scale.exploitability: HIGH — lose your asset if you can't repay; no credit check
desperation_scale.economic_signal: ↑ pawn activity = last resort before crisis. Industry $655M, 841 businesses.
desperation_scale.data_proxy: ASX:CCV pawn volumes + ASIC credit licence count + ABS ANZSIC 6229
desperation_scale.notes: Cash Converters loan book +20% FY2023. CEO cited 'broader cross-section' of society (AFR Oct 2023).

desperation_scale.label: Rent-to-Own / Consumer Leases
desperation_scale.exploitability: VERY HIGH — targets Centrelink recipients, direct debits welfare payments
desperation_scale.economic_signal: Growing lease volumes = unable to save for essentials.
desperation_scale.notes: Radio Rentals downsized significantly post-2019 after ASIC enforcement action for unconscionable conduct.

desperation_scale.label: Debt Collection / Distressed Debt
desperation_scale.economic_signal: Rising PDL volumes = wave of defaults upstream. Lags by 12–18 months.
desperation_scale.notes: Credit Corp record PDL acquisitions FY2022–23 as banks sold COVID-deferred debt portfolios.

desperation_scale.label: Personal Insolvency
desperation_scale.exploitability: HIGH — debt agreement admin fees can consume large % of repayments
desperation_scale.economic_signal: FY2024: 12,447 (+15.3% YoY). Part IX Debt Agreements growing fastest. Lags 6–24 months.
desperation_scale.notes: Lagging indicator — 6–24 months behind the inciting financial stress.
